content.text: Once content has been saved in the CMS you'll want a way to retrieve it. Your CMS instance has methods to fetch specific Entries or search through all content.
Content can be queried within React server components (and functions that run on the server such as generateStaticParams).
There are multiple ways to get your data, which one you use depends on how you want to receive that data

body.code:
cms.find() // Always returns an array

cms.first() // Returns the first result or null
cms.get() // Returns only one result (use only when you are sure it exists)

cms.count() // Returns the amount of results

content.text: After deciding how you want to receive your data we need to tell the cms where to look for the data. Here we can easily divide our options into 4 groups
